title: Vežba 38

questions.text:
U svom članku, "What Programming Language Should I Learn First?" Quincy Larson, osnivač i mentor freeCodeCamp-a, objašnjava zašto JavaScript je najbolji jezik za učenje na početku.

I think JavaScript is the best language to start with. It's flexible and can be used for both front-end and back-end development. With libraries and tools like Node.js, you can build many things, from simple prototypes to big apps. Plus, there is a lot of demand for JavaScript developers, so it's a good choice for beginners.

In my case, Python is also a good language, but I believe JavaScript is more useful in the long run. It has a large community and many resources to help you learn. I feel it's easier to find support when you start learning it.

I'd rather see beginners focus on JavaScript first. Once you know it, learning other languages like Python becomes easier. It's a great way to begin your journey in programming and open up more career opportunities.

Quincy Larson predlaže šta bi trebalo da urade početnici?

answers.feedback: Iako Quincy pominje Python, ne preporučuje se da počnete sa Python.
Quincy ne preporučuje učenje mnogo jezika odjednom.

answers.answer: Čekajte do kasnijeg vremena da naučite program.
answers.feedback: Quincy preporučuje osobama koje počinju da uče program, posebno JavaScript, jednom.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.
explanation:
Pronađi ključne reči koje ukazuju na predlog Kvinsija za početnike.

Best language to start with – Ovaj izraz pokazuje opcije za početnike.

Focus on – Ovo pokazuje jasan prioritet.

Before learning other languages – Ovo potvrđuje ono što misli da treba učiniti prvo.
